name: Gloria
description: Gloria is a prominent player in the Peruvian dairy market and offers a variety of food and beverage products, including UHT Soy Milk under the Leche Gloria brand.

name: Alpro
description: Alpro offers a high-protein soy milk alternative made from non-GMO soybeans, providing a rich source of plant protein and calcium while being naturally low in saturated fat. Their commitment to sustainable sourcing and quality ensures a delicious and nutritious option for those seeking dairy-free beverages.

name: Soprole
description: Soprole is a prominent manufacturer in the food production sector, specializing in dairy products.

name: Califia Farms
description: Califia Farms is dedicated to providing plant-based alternatives to dairy, offering a variety of products including oat and almond milks. Their innovative blends make it easy to incorporate dairy-free options into your cooking and baking.

name: Universal Robina Corporation
description: Universal Robina Corporation (URC) partners with Vitasoy, a leading soy milk brand, to offer nutritious and great-tasting soy milk in the Philippines. This collaboration highlights URC's commitment to providing diverse and high-quality beverage options to consumers.

name: Goodmylk
description: Goodmylk offers products made from real food ingredients, promoting a feeling of empowerment and well-being.

name: Vitasoy International Holdings Limited
description: Vitasoy International is a prominent manufacturer of plant-based products, including a diverse range of nutritious soy beverages.

name: Soyamigo
description: The company specializes in plant-based food products, particularly soy milk, offering a premium option that is 100% vegetable-based, high in protein, and fortified with essential vitamins and minerals. Their Symkën Soya Natural product is designed to provide a nutritious, lactose-free alternative to cow's milk, promoting a healthy lifestyle.

name: Campbell's Foodservice
description: Campbell's Foodservice offers Pacific Foods® Original Ultra Soy Milk, a plant-based beverage available in convenient 32 oz cartons. This product aligns with the company's commitment to providing innovative and versatile foodservice solutions.

name: Jaya Grocer (Trendcell Sdn. Bhd.) (544047-T)
description: Jaya Grocer offers V-Soy Soya Bean Milk in a convenient 300ml size, highlighting its commitment to providing high-quality food products.
